result.summary: Found 4 visual issues on this page, primarily related to content clipping and truncation on the right edge of the viewport, suggesting horizontal overflow or carousel/scroll container issues.

issues.description: Navigation tab 'Hot Games' is cut off and shows only 'Hot Gam' at the right edge of the tab bar, making it unreadable and indicating horizontal overflow or improper truncation handling.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the horizontal tab navigation either scrolls properly with visible scroll indicators, or compress tab labels to fit within the viewport. Use 'text-overflow: ellipsis' or a scroll container with proper padding.

issues.description: Multiple game card thumbnails in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section are cut off on the right side (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...' and 'MUNC MI...'), with game titles partially hidden and images clipped, making them unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the game grid uses proper responsive layout with adequate padding or that the carousel/scroll container is visually indicated with arrows or partial card reveals to hint at scrollability.

issues.description: In the 'Top Played New Games' section, the rightmost game card column is also clipped (e.g., 'HYPERC...' and 'DAR WATE...'), making content partially invisible with no affordance indicating horizontal scrollability.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible scroll indicator or 'See All' arrow to signal that more content is available. Alternatively, constrain the grid to fully visible columns only and rely on the '26 Games' button for access to the rest.

issues.description: The promotional banner text 'BET IT ON BLACK AND GOLD!' appears to be Pittsburgh Penguins themed, but the copy is ambiguous for a casino context and may confuse users unfamiliar with the sports tie-in.
issues.suggestion: Add a brief subtitle or context label (e.g., 'Penguins-themed games now available') to clarify the promotion's intent and improve user comprehension.
